programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes a solemn promise to not move from his spot until Sanji returns to him. But as Mama's army advances, that promise may prove a costly one. Meanwhile, Sanji and the Vinsmokes come face to face with Big Mom and his bride-to-be Pudding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands his ground and waits for his friend to return! But the vengeful army washes over him - only a true friend can step in to turn the tide of battle! Meanwhile, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage - and come to a startling conclusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts his all into battling Big Mom's vengeful army, however, their skills combined prove too formidable. Meanwhile, Sanji goes to Big Mom herself to bargain for the Straw Hats lives - with shocking results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot are captured by Brulee and strung up for dinner! But Chopper sees a chance to free himself! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro launch a plan to reach the Ponegliffs - a daring game of chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pekoms creates a diversion for Brook to set his plan into action. Meanwhile, Luffy continues to goad Big Mom into a fight, and Pudding begins to have stirrings of rebellion herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Just when Luffy and Nami are in Big Mom's grasp, Pudding arrives, but with news that they aren't expecting - meanwhile Brook and Chopper both make headway getting out of their own jams!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hopes his wedding with Pudding will solve the Straw Hat's predicament - but Pudding secretly plans to to avoid the marriage, sharing a secret with Luffy. Meanwhile, Brook comes face to face with Big Mom herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries desperately to free himself as the risk of his own well-being! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot continue to search the mirror universe, Brook squares off against Big Mom, and Pedro's past is revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to break himself free as Sanji falls deeper in love with the idea of marrying Pudding... But the mask falls off and the deadly charade of Big Mom is revealed as the depths of her treachery come to light!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook continues his all-out struggle against Big Mom, but his secret weapon might not be enough to save him! Meanwhile, an unexpected ally from the past comes to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei arrives on the scene and works to free Luffy and Nami! Meanwhile Sanji confronts his sister with the awful truth of Pudding, and she confides in him the powerful secret of their mother's undying love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook finds himself totally at the whim of Big Mom, and comes face to face with her brutal love! Meanwhile, Pedro reveals his explosive plan to create a distraction!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot use the mirror dimension to get in touch with Nami and Jimbei! Luffy makes it through more obstacles to learn that he just missed Sanji! Meanwhile, Sanji wonders alone about the best course of action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook hears Big Mom's plan firsthand as she shares her intentions with Pudding in front of him! Meanwhile, Big Mom's agents believe most of the Straw Hats to be under control, but doubt besets Montd'Or.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others finally find Brook in the mirror dimension - but he's in the most inopportune of places! Can they challenge the sleeping Mama and rescue their friend? Meanwhile, Luffy is waylaid on his way back to the rendezvous!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts up a valiant fight in order to keep his word to Sanji! But will he be able to last until Sanji arrives at the rendezvous? Meanwhile, Jimbei shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Luffy meet finally - and while he is happy to feed Luffy to replenish his energy, Sanji's explanation of what actions he must take baffles Luffy! The crucial decision, to turn his back on his friends or his family, tears Sanji apart!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The newly reunited Luffy and Sanji hear from the rest of the Straw Hats in the mirror dimension! Then, Jimbei starts telling them about Capone "Gang" Bege and proposes a shocking plan to take down Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats put Jimbei's plan into action and approach Bege with the possibility of an alliance. But before they are granted an audience, they must make themselves presentable!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The proposed alliance between the Straw Hats and Bege unfolds! A gaseous blast from the past, Gastino, a member of Bege's team, reveals the secret weapon that the team plans to use against the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now, the assassination plan of Big Mom is all set and everyone starts preparing for the Tea Party. Montd'Or finds one of his crewmates, Bobbin the Disposer, dead, and suspects Sanji and Luffy of the crime.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The day has arrived! Guests from the criminal underground pour in droves, but some have their own agendas to settle! Big Mom's sons, however, stand in their way and show them what they've got! Meanwhile, Luffy is preparing for his own plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Final preparations abound on all sides and multiple plots start to come together! But can Sanji keep his nerve and go through with the plan? Or will Pudding's beauty prove too enchanting?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All plans go into action as the moment of the wedding arrives - but as the veil is lifted on Pudding's grotesque face, all hell breaks loose and unexpected circumstances mean chaos at the altar! Meanwhile, Luffy charges in, adding to the mayhem!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is launched! Big Mom falls to pieces as the wedding - and the wedding cake - are destroyed and a slew of Luffys are wreaking havoc around the site. But just when Luffy gets in trouble, Jimbei confronts Big Mom bravely!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is in full swing however - Big Mom is pushed past the edge of sanity and can't even bring herself to act. Meanwhile, her children make a move against Germa and Pudding takes up her original aim of killing Sanji!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plot is in full swing as Luffy dashes towards Big Mom to show her the broken portrait again! Sanji makes an effort to free his family and wins the respect of his sister, and Big Mom loses her wits!

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.desc: Boone (Kevin Kilner) and Lili (Lisa Howard) are summoned to the small Amish town of Paradise to investigate the mysterious deaths of several of its citizens.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Jonathan Doors (David Hemblen) comes out from hiding, launching a media attack against the Taelons, leaving Boone (Kevin Kilner) to deal with the ramifications.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a long list of suspects from violent felons to lesbian love triangles; in the end, they find a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What originally looks like a heart attack turns out to be a calculated execution; soon, detectives unravel a murder plot that hits a little too close to home.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: After a woman is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a web of late-night encounters, secret lovers and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A woman is found stabbed to death in her apartment; with a long list of admirers, investigators uncover secret obsessions leading to a sadistic killer suspected by no one.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is strangled to death in the middle of a Hawaiian paradise; investigators quickly focus in on two suspects, but nothing comes easy as they spend more than a decade striving to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A retired couple are found beaten to death in their country club estate, but detectives soon discover that what happens in Vegas doesn't always stay there as they hunt down this monstrous killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover; the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs four people their lives.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found dead in a lake; as her small town grieves, law enforcement finds itself on a 20-plus year investigation that leads to a killer who was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: An apartment fire proves to be arson set to cover up the murder of a young woman, but the discovery of a secret double life and unique evidence leads detectives to the killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A witness comes face to face with the killer of a small-town beautician, but despite having an eyewitness, it would take years and a surprise tip to lead detectives to who strangled a beloved member of the community.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a 4-year-old finds his great-grandparents melted, he runs for help, launching an investigation into their double murder; a young woman disappears, leaving the Memphis, Tenn., community hoping for her safe return.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A missing persons case becomes something much darker when a sick, sinister affair is uncovered, leading investigators to believe foul play is involved.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of a restaurateur with no solid suspects and no murder weapon leaves detectives in a lurch, but when financial motives come to light, an undercover operation and clever forensic investigation turn the case upside-down.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The final four assume super hero and super foe alter egos and go to epic heights to vanquish their nemesis. RuPaul is joined by guest judges actress/comedian Wendi McClendon – Covey and Mistress of the Dark Elvira.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Ming Warrior, the vicious death dealer who used exploding land-mines and fire arrows to launch China's greatest empire battles the Musketeer, an elite French fighter who blasted enemies with a gut-busting musket.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: An epic match featuring the Comanche, the fierce, Native American killer against the Mongol, the barbaric warrior who conquered more territory than any empire in history.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As one participant thrives on the island, the others struggle to improve their situation. One man races to find the salmon run before it ends.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: After a month in the unrelenting bush, nature and seclusion are proving difficult to withstand.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: It's anyone's game when four bladesmiths are tasked with forging blades from old toys using the san mai technique. The smiths realize playtime is over as the pressure of the competition heats up and they experience difficult delaminations.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: On the 50th anniversary of the first steps on the moon, four bladesmiths compete to recreate a space-age M-1 NASA Survival Knife out of ball bearings.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: It's a battle royale for four bladesmiths when they are tasked with forging signature blades with an integral knuckle duster from a steel cage and barbed wire.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: When a survivalist doctor goes missing, Holmes and Watson must determine whether he's purposely gone off the grid or if he's a victim of foul play.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who organizes illegal, high-stakes poker games arrives on Holmes and Watson's doorstep and tells them her life is in danger claiming to be a former associate of Mycroft, Sherlock's brother.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: As Holmes and Watson investigate a woman's murder, they discover her death is linked to a piece of artwork that has ties to a crime that was committed when she was in college.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: When Holmes and Watson are pulled into a double-homicide investigation, they discover the victims were staging a fake murder right at the moment they were killed.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Sherlock's father, Morland, becomes Sherlock and Joan's prime suspect in a murder investigation after one of his employees is killed under the guise of a robbery.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: When Holmes and Watson discover the perpetrator behind the attempt made on Morland's life, they find a shocking connection to themselves.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson's lives are threatened by an influential, worldwide criminal network connected to the murder attempt on Morland Holmes.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The detectives must piece together partial clues to lead them to the murderer of a husband-and-wife team of psychiatrists. Country singer CRAIG MORGAN guest stars.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A bride is killed just before she walks down the aisle, and Jane and Maura are on the case. Plus, Jane has a new neighbor who captures the attention of Angela, Frankie and Frost.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A boy band star is murdered. Jane and Frankie, who grew up with the victim, work to solve the case. Plus, will Angela learn the truth about Lydia's (ALEXANDRA HOLDEN) pregnancy?

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: In the summer finale, when a statue breaks open to reveal a dead woman inside, Jane and Maura must find the killer quickly. Plus, Dennis (EDDIE CIBRIAN) returns for Maura.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: When a man having breakfast in the Division 1 Café dies from poisoning, Jane and the team must quickly find the source as Angela and Stanley (ALAN RACHINS) come under scrutiny.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A famous young writer is found dead in an apparent suicide, but Jane and Maura soon discover there's more to the story. Jane discovers Angela is involved in a secret romance.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The virtual world and the real world collide when a microbrewer is killed. Jane and the team begin to mentor underprivileged teenagers, a move that ends in near disaster.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Harrison Ford stars as the wrongly convicted Dr. Richard Kimble, and Tommy Lee Jones is U.S. Marshal Sam Gerard, his relentless pursuer, in this intense thriller based on the hit television series of the 1960s.

programme.title: No Country For Old Men
programme.desc: Winner of four Academy Awards, including Best Picture, filmmakers Joel and Ethan Coen (FARGO) bring to the screen a thrilling bestseller in which a crime-scene's irresistible stolen loot sets forth an unstoppable chain reaction of violence.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: Libby Parsons, who discovers that the husband she’s convicted of murdering staged his own “death” and framed her for the crime. Released on parole, she skips town to find him–and that puts parole officer Travis Lehman on her trail.

programme.title: Deepstar Six

programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: UFO Chronicles: The Lost Knowledge
programme.desc: The Ancient Alien theory expanded as Dolores Cannon explains the Alien creator's intention when creating the Earth and the first humans. The man who discovered the first UFO crash in 1947 is remembered by his son, Jesse Marcel Jr.

programme.title: UFO Chronicles: The Smoking Gun
programme.desc: UFO investigators reveal new evidence of the Alien crash at Roswell. From reconstructing the memo held by General Ramey to the actual sequence of events, hear shocking new insights into the greatest cover-up of all time.

programme.title: Phenomenon: The Lost Archives
programme.desc: In 1960, a joint US-Turkish expedition sets out to investigate the aerial sighting of a boat-shaped object located in eastern Turkey. Could this be the mortal remains of the legendary Noah's Ark?

programme.title: Phenomenon: The Lost Archives
programme.desc: Thought by many to be a government organization maintained to provide financial accountability in the event of a domestic depression, the actual business of the FED is shrouded in secrecy.

programme.title: Phenomenon: The Lost Archives
programme.desc: At the end of the 19th century, a race was on to power the world. Caught in the crossfire was inventor Nikola Tesla, who claimed he could provide everyone with free, unlimited energy. Was it true?

programme.title: Phenomenon: The Lost Archives
programme.desc: Just prior to the Russian Revolution, a mysterious explosion occurred in the desolate northlands of Siberia. Was it an asteroid? Or could it have been the explosion of an extraterrestrial craft?

programme.title: Phenomenon: The Lost Archives
programme.desc: With the collapse of communism and the rise of freedom in the Russian Federation, recent access to documents in the Kremlin archives reveal a story intended to remain buried forever.

programme.title: Urartu: The Forgotten Kingdom
programme.desc: Urartu is one of the most mysterious states in the history of the ancient world. This documentary will help us recollect its history and to get acquainted with its unique background and developed culture, economy, astronomy and religious life.

programme.title: Lost Army of King Cambyses
programme.desc: While escaping the Egyptians 2,500 years ago, the Persian King Cambyses led his army into the desert and disappeared forever. Despite efforts in the 1930s to discover what happened to him, no clues were found until 1996.

programme.title: Kennedy Curse
programme.desc: The Kennedy family has long been plagued by tragedy and scandal. Despite this, they have brought major positive change to the world, in often difficult times.

programme.title: JFK's Women: The Scandals Revealed
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy, the charismatic president. However, with all that charm came a hidden life of reckless sexual adventure. He had a confirmed affair with Marilyn Monroe, and at least five of his endeavors posed a potential threat to national security.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: When a psychotic trucker takes offense at the pranks pulled by a couple of college students, the young kids are sucked into a whirlpool of terror.

programme.title: Devon
programme.desc: Years after Devon disappeared, a mysterious website draws five adventurers to the abandoned asylum where she was last seen. Armed with cameras, they plunge into the darkness, unaware they’re filming their own descent into horror—never meant to return.

programme.title: The Ring
programme.desc: When four teenagers all meet with mysterious deaths exactly one week after watching a videotape, investigative reporter Rachel Keller tracks down the video... and watches it.

programme.title: The Ring Two
programme.desc: When evidence at a local crime scene reveals a mysterious unmarked videotape, Rachel realizes that Samara is back and more determined than ever to continue her relentless cycle of terror.

programme.title: The Reading
programme.desc: After a deadly home invasion, Emma (Mo'Nique Hicks) copes by writing a book, but when a young psychic and her team perform a reading in her home, a new terror is unleashed.

programme.title: Hollow Man
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Elisabeth Shue play former lovers who, along with a team of other scientists like themselves, discover the secret of invisibility. Rating: R

programme.title: Idle Hands

programme.title: Half Nelson
programme.desc: A powerful, award-winning film about an inner-city junior high school teacher with a drug habit who forms an unlikely friendship with one of his students after she discovers his secret.

programme.title: Hart's War
programme.desc: War hero Col. McNamara is imprisoned in a German POW camp. As the camp's highest-ranking American officer, he commands his fellow inmates. Never giving up the fight to win the war, McNamara is planning, waiting for his moment to strike back at the enemy.

programme.title: S.F.W.
programme.desc: Cliff Spab is held hostage for a gruelling 36 days with every move recorded on national TV. On release he finds he has become a household name which provides to be imprisonment of a different sort.

programme.title: Valkyrie
programme.desc: In WWII, a group of German officers plots to assassinate Hitler and seize control of the military command to end the war. The operation was codenamed "Valkyrie", for the plan that was meant to be used in case of a revolt against the Nazi government.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Hailed as a landmark film that dazzles with deep emotion and exceptional acting, PHILADELPHIA stars Tom Hanks and Denzel Washington as two competing lawyers who join forces to sue a prestigious law firm for AIDS discrimination. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Planes, Trains and Automobiles
programme.desc: Neal just wants to fly home to Chicago for Thanksgiving with his family. But all he gets is misery. Misery named Del Griffith — a loud mouthed salesman who leads Neal on a wild goose chase.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Friends and family gather to save two addicts--Rachel, once a beautiful child in an upper-middle class family who has turned to heroin and prostitution, and Tommy, who quit his executive job and sold his Lexus to sustain his cocaine habit.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: A former top high school athlete gets hooked on pills and beer after suffering an emotionally devastating incident--he was not put into a big game against a rival school.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: This emotionally gripping documentary series helps people confront their darkest demons and hopefully find a route to redemption.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Corinne is a pretty 18 year-old blonde girl who was an honor roll student, star athlete and played the clarinet and saxophone.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Audrey, 24, was popular and artistic. Now, she is a heroin addict living on the streets.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must figure out if a decomposed body is that of a local missing woman and if she was murdered.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: During her career as a medical examiner, Dr. G has autopsied thousands of murder victims. In this episode, Dr. G shares her most memorable case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G reviews a woman's medical records and learns that she suffered from an auto-immune disease called lupus, which might have something to do with her death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Motor vehicle fatalities account for many of the cases that come into the morgue. Dr. G offers expertise as to how to get behind the wheel and not wind up on a steel table.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A runaway teen's murder in Fresno, CA, hits too close to home.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A Washington teen's innocent trip to the store ends in murder.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Miami, a good Samaritan is shot dead while intervening in a robbery. Det. TC Cepero is forced to resort to a needle-in-a-haystack search for the getaway car, and for the homeless woman who may have seen the killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Birmingham, Lead Det. Henry Lucas and the Birmingham Homicide Team are trying to solve the mystery of how a young man ended up shot in the back in the middle of a scrap yard.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Harris County, Deputy Mario Quintanilla and his team are investigating the mysterious disappearance and possible murder of a 20-year-old single mother.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: Assault from the Air introduces a third dimension to a battlefield. The program focuses on the key requirements in a Battleplan for Assault from the Air and the changes that technology has brought.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: A raid is an offensive military operation that aims to achieve a specific objective and then get out. It is a Battleplan which can be used against human or military targets and often requires elite special forces.

programme.title: The Third Reich in Color
programme.desc: From 1937, colour films also document life in Hitler's Germany. Eva Braun and Hitler's pilot Hans Baur are among the first amateur filmmakers to expose the new celluloid.

programme.title: The Third Reich in Color
programme.desc: During the war with the Soviet Union, 35mm color footage was used for Nazi propaganda. Hitler's pilot filmed his visit to the front lines.

programme.title: The Third Reich in Color
programme.desc: In 1944, in southern England, Allied troops are getting ready to land in Normandy. US soldier Jack Lieb is there with his amateur camera. On D-Day, John Ford shoots in colour with his camera crews.

programme.title: World War II: The Real Mighty Eighth
programme.desc: Discover the origins, and pioneers, of the Mighty Eighth and follow its birth and growth as it rises from the furnace of global conflict.

programme.title: World War II: The Real Mighty Eighth

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII
programme.desc: After the naval battle in Midway the U.S.A. regain the leading drive of the war in the Pacific.

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of the Ardennes (the Battle of the Bulge). Conquest of Berlin. Hitler's death. Surrender and end of the war in Europe.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: Breaking a fortified line is the Battleplan every soldier fears, and every commander’s last resort. It means attacking defences head-on that are dug in and protected. The enemy is ready for it and expecting it. It’s going to be a bloodbath.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: The Battleplan for Blockade is directed not against an army or navy, or an individual town or city, but against a nation as a whole. Learn how blockades have the ability to destroy or at least damage a country’s ability to wage war.

programme.title: World War II: The Real Mighty Eighth
programme.desc: By 1943 The Mighty Eighth has become a sprawling giant of military air power. The sheer numbers of men and equipment now require a complex system of orders to launch as many as 600 planes at once.

programme.title: World War II: The Real Mighty Eighth
programme.desc: Once again, the USAAF 1st Motion Picture Unit witnesses, first hand, a deadly mission against the tyranny of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: World War II: The Real Mighty Eighth

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Marcos no puede perdonar a nadie que desee hacerle daño a Patricia. Por eso mató a Fedora y a Bruno, dos personas que la querían ver sufrir mucho.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Marcos va a ver a Bruno y lo encuentra bañándose. Marcos le dice que mató a Fedora y luego lanza una cuchilla de afeitar en el agua de la bañera y Bruno muere electrocutado.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Gomoso informa a Teto de la hija de Rafael. Sergio se inscribe al 'dúo de oro', y Misael advierte a Rafael sobre Gustavo. Además, Gustavo propone un negocio a Betty, Mariela y Luisa, mientras Martha escapa con su bebé del auto de Alfredo.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Martha va a la piscina, donde Rafael la saluda discretamente. Más tarde, Martha cita a Rafael y confiesa su escapada. Posteriormente, Teto, Fino, Gomoso y Mansini asisten al concierto de Rafael. En el concierto, Rafael le dedica una canción a Martha.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Gomoso presenta a su padre, Mansini, mientras Rafael canta afónico en el Festival. Dionisio recibe una oferta de Mansini. Rafael al cantar para Martha, provoca celos en Teto. Rafael y Salvador son entrevistados para un diario.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Teto contrata un Abogado para Martha. Clara continúa recibiendo las llamadas anónimas de infidelidad. Vivian revela la infidelidad a Clara. El Abogado altera los documentos y sin saberlo, Martha firma y luego regresa a Barranquilla.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Martha ve a Teto solo como amigo, mientras Alfredo busca a su hijo en casa de Martha, generando preocupación por el bebé. Gomoso y Teto se amenazan de muerte. Sergio es hallado malherido en la carretera, y Mansini es detenido por golpearlo.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Jaime se enfrenta con la falta de dinero para liberar a Teto. Fino presta efectivo para escrituras de Jaime. Rafael alerta a Clara de posible cáncer de Salvador. Teto plantea opción legal para recuperar el hijo de Martha. Martha desahoga sus emociones.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy celebra una ruidosa fiesta en su departamento y recibe la queja de su vecino quien, siendo pagado por doña Gertrudis, utiliza la más mínima estrategia para intentar desacreditarlo.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy espera la llegada de su futura esposa elegida irresponsablemente al azar, después del lanzamiento de su anuncio de prensa, para cumplir con la cláusula de testamento impuesta por Gertrudis.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Después de tanto silencio y tantos planes que expresó con emoción Willy, Mariana decide hablar de su anterior compromiso matrimonial para así descartar la idea de que su amor es posible.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: En la universidad, Willy y Mariana se besan tras su reunión, dándole la oportunidad a Margot de descubrir quién es su rival. Valentín no tiene otra opción que rendirse ante el chantaje de Natalia.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Al buscar la ayuda de su madre, Mariana es víctima de una desagradable noticia, que presuntamente expresa el deseo de Leonora de no ser molestada por su antigua familia.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Después de firmar el contrato comprometiéndose a casarse con un desconocido millonario, Mariana expresa a su amiga Elena el temor por un futuro incierto al lado de un hombre que no ama.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)

programme.desc: Antonia es sacada de su hacienda esposada; Balmaceda es obligado a llevársela cargándola. Verónica le da pistas al comisionado acerca de Guerra. Lucho teme que el mismo policía que lo llevó a prisión descubra todo. David es sorprendido con su novia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro quiere ayudar a David a pedir la mano de Cecilia. Pero antes, quiere saber si está enamorado de ella. Verónica y Lucho están a punto de hacer el amor. Antonia ve desnudo a Balmaseda en su cuarto y sueña que tiene una noche de pasión con él.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le pide a su novio que huya de casa porque Rodrigo ha iniciado un operativo para detenerlo. Irene escucha que su marido ama a Verónica, busca un calmante en el baño de Antonia y encuentra el frasquito del veneno que ella usa con Valentina.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro entra en la habitación de Verónica y la reta: o lo manda a sacar con sus hombres o se queda para siempre en su vida. Ella distrae a la policía con las dos mujeres árabes y Lucho logra escapar, pero se queda en el pueblo. Irene no despierta.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La camioneta donde viajan Dínora, Fernando y sus rehenes, se atasca en arenas movedizas, tienen que esconderse en el mangle. Carmela y Malcolm huyen con el dinero, pero son capturados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Fernando que revise si traen con ellos el dinero, se dan cuenta del engaño de sus empleados. Dínora cambia la ruta para despistar a la policía y hace que se pierdan más.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela se agota en el recorrido por la selva pantanosa, Juan dice que no va a continuar sin ella. Dínora dispara al aire y esto lo escuchan Franco y Óscar, que van tras esa pista.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora admite que están perdidos, no los ha guiado bien, le jura a Fernando que pase lo que pase, Juan no sale con vida, entrada la noche, un animal pica a Dínora. Rosario despierta del coma.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar le muestra a Juan pruebas de la traición de José. Juan le promete a Paula que no le faltará nada a ella ni al bebé, no puede disimular el amor que siente al saber que la mujer que ama lo hará padre.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Todos están inquietos por la desaparición de Pablo y Adela. Juan les dice a todos que Pablo es su padre biológico. José queda aterrado por la noticia, sabe que Juan es un verdadero del Monte, y nadie sospecha que él es el autor del secuestro.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Modesto le dice a Juan que él y Paula son hermanos de sangre, y que Pablo en realidad es Emilio del Monte. Gaspar se pone muy agresivo con su esposa. José sigue con sus planes turbios. Miguel descubre que tienen las pastillas que Lucas le dio.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula renuncia a la herencia de los del Monte. Julieta se entera que Paula está embarazada de Juan y se obsesiona con hacerle daño. Los hermanos se dan cuenta que José quiere estafarlos. Rosario le pide a Lucas que se aleje de Nacho.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams are in Liverpool, England, where they experience a once-in-a-lifetime shoot-out at the historic Anfield Stadium, home of the Liverpool FC.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final teams race through Las Vegas, where the world's greatest illusionist, David Copperfield, designs a final challenge that requires the remaining teams to master the art of illusion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven teams take off from Los Angeles, California on race around the world, starting with a stop in Valparaiso, Chile, where a high-wire walk Roadblock tests the mettle of several racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The ten remaining teams depart Palacio Baburizza in Valparaiso, Chile, taking a lengthy bus trip to Puerto Varas.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Gruta de la Virgen in Puerto Varas, Chile for Bariloche, Argentina.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Estancia Fortin Chacabuco in Bariloche, Argentina for Hamburg, Germany.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.desc: The seven remaining teams drive from the Pit Stop at the Church of Massiges in Verdun, France to Reims.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Pinang Peranakan Mansion in Penang, Malaysia and head to Singapore, where they learn that a U-Turn awaits.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie and Elijah learn a new survival tactic from Negan; Eugene's group clears walkers to pay their fines; Yumiko interviews for an upper-class job; Daryl learns more about Leah and the Reapers; Gabriel encounters a man of God.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Reapers defend Meridian from an incoming herd; Pope suspects Maggie is behind the attack, while Daryl treads carefully; Alexandrians scramble to protect themselves when a violent storm leaves them vulnerable to walkers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma; Morgan and Duane help teach Rick the new rules for survival.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick unknowingly causes a group of survivors to be trapped by walkers; Rick must confront an enemy more dangerous than the undead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick goes back to Atlanta to save a man's life; Lori and Shane deal with the surprise return of someone they thought was dead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors threatens Rick, Daryl, T-Dog and Glenn, sending Rick's mission to Atlanta awry; Jim becomes unhinged back at camp.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group to the CDC hoping to cure an infected Jim, who must make a terrible life-and-death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group are allowed into the CDC by a strange doctor; all is not what it seems in their newfound haven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group out of Atlanta; the group is stopped by a threat unlike anything anyone has seen before; the search for someone who has gone missing.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick discovers a possible safe haven; Shane must go on a dangerous mission to get needed medical supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group awaits Shane's return; Shane finds himself trapped in a school; Daryl and Andrea search for someone in the woods.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane makes a deadly sacrifice that inspires unusual behavior and self-distancing; the rest of the group struggles to find the balance between living to die and dying to live.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the other survivors continue searching for Sophia; Hershel disagrees with the group's plan and tells them they are only welcome at the farm temporarily.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn knows too much for his comfort level; Daryl finds a sign of life and tries to make it back to the farm alive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Secrets are told and revealed; Hershel refuses to acknowledge the world's new reality; Andrea comes out of her shell; everything is food for something.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo debe averiguar cómo salir de una situación peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo debe defender a Alexandria de una fuerza amenazante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras el encuentro de Daryl y Lydia con Alpha, los habitantes de las comunidades enfrentadas a los Susurradores, que se aproximan a la Cumbre, tienen dos opciones: huir o pelear. Entretanto, surgen problemas entre Eugene y Stephanie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne lleva a Virgil de regreso a su misteriosa isla para reunirse con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete armas que podrían cambiar el rumbo de la Guerra de los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne devuelve a Virgil a la isla misteriosa de la que proviene para que se reencuentre con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete que le entregará un arsenal que cambiará el rumbo de la guerra contra los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Todos, héroes y villanos, se adaptan a las consecuencias del devastador incendio que destruyó la comunidad. Eugene encabeza a un grupo que parte en busca de Stephanie, guiados por la esperanza de encontrar otra civilización.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Princess asusta a los caballos de Eugene, Yumiko y Ezekiel, pero les promete otro medio de transporte. Mientras, Beta, en estado de delirio psicótico, guía a la horda de zombis hacia Alexandria para destruirlo todo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los seguidores de Beta se acercan a las puertas, y parte del grupo se impregna de sangre de zombi para intentar escapar entre la multitud de caminantes y regresar con ayuda. Sin embargo, los susurradores se mueven con cuchillos entre los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejado del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aaron buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alexandria, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko y Princess son capturados y separados por los misteriosos soldados que los rodeaban en la estación ferroviaria. Princess lucha con los recuerdos de su traumático pasado y planea escapar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol toman caminos separados. Ella regresa a Alexandria, mientras él se adentra en los bosques. A partir de este momento, cado uno deberá usar sus habilidades de supervivencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie vuelve a Alexandria mientras Carol lleva a Negan a un viaje para minimizar la tensión en aumento. Negan reflexiona sobre su difunta esposa Lucille.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl lidera un equipo de misión para buscar en la base militar que descubrió. Por su parte, Maggie cuenta su historia, lo que impulsa una nueva misión de supervivencia que solo Negan puede liderar.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Cheyenne Indians are believed responsible for the daily death of five laborers whoare working to construct a railroad line. It is claimed that the Indians will stop the attacks if they are paid $500,000 in gold spikes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West fights off an unprovoked knife-wielding assailant and then meets a beautiful blonde named Marie.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. agent James T. West enlists in a secret army of fanatics whose demented leader is plotting to overthrow United States Army units stationed in the Southwest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon go after Dr. Cadwallader, demented geologist who is systematically devastating the state of Wyoming with man-made earthquakes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Gov. Bradford and his secretary, Miss Piecemeal, watch as the governor's statue is unveiled during a private showing at the Bolt Museum. Suddenly, the statue blinks, and Bradford, immobilized by an injection, is taken prisoner.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. secret agent James T. West is lured into a hospital where he is gassed and carried out in a coffin by the weird, zombie-like aides of one Dr. Arcularis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a notorious desperado, Frank Slade, inaplan to arrest a Mexican bandit, Colonel Vasquez, who has been robbing banks in American border towns and then fleeing to the sanctuary of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Iron Man Torres strangles a shop owner named Gilbert as secret agent James T. West passes by.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon set out to crack a thriving opium-and-alien smuggling operation in San Francisco and become involved in struggle for control of Hunan Province, China.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West is investigating the loss of government suppliers of kerosene and copper when his stagecoach is halted by a sheet of flame.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon, assigned to protect a Middle Eastern despot from assassination, find their task complicated by the attitude of the degenerate tyrant, Emir El Emid.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon help Governor Lewis keep the state of California solvent by seeing that a pledged $5,000,000 from each of three wealthy but disreputable personsis turned over to the governor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two U.S. Supreme Court Justices have died mysteriously but Justice Chaynedis misses secret agent James T. West's concern for his life.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a Federal prison inspector and his side-kick, Artemus Gordon, pretends he is a preacher when the two are assigned to halt an organized outbreak of terror that has paralyzed a western community.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The show returns to Dorchester, MA, the home of the first This Old House project, to follow the renovation of a triple decker that burned from illegal fireworks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Asbestos is removed from exposed ductwork. Richard meets the new plumber. Jenn visits a community garden. A local historian speaks about triple deckers. Tom and Charlie pull off the melted siding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The back porches are brought to code. Ice blasting is used to get rid of the fire odor. New vinyl siding gets installed. Homeowner Carol considers new accent colors to match. Framing begins inside.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa translates an ancient stone tablet which directs the gang to locate the "Fortress of Fear." Now they have until sunset to find this mysterious structure or they'll be trapped in the world of Capsule Monsters forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends discover that in order to return home to the real world they must pass a series of tests: the Five Sacred Trials. The first of which pits them against enormous sand worms and a mysterious voice that travels with the desert wind.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping their battle in the desert, the gang finds themselves stranded on a mysterious floating island, where they face a monster that derives its strength from the sun.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's on to level three as Yugi and his friends are transported to a lava-covered wasteland. To make matters worse, Joey is possessed by an evil force, and destroying it may mean destroying Joey as well.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends are faced with an impossible task: locating a magical apple in a forest full of apple trees.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang stumbles upon a small kingdom dominated by a clan of fierce dragons known as The Fiendish Five. If they fail to slay these beasts, one of Yugi's friends must give up his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends defeat the Fiendish Five…or so they think. These ferocious dragons have merged together and are now more powerful than ever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Although the gang has passed the five sacred trials, the most dangerous test is yet to come. Now Yugi must face the spirit of Alexander the Great in an all-out Capsule Monsters war with the ultimate stakes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are unconscious, leaving him to defeat Alexander the Great on his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa found the Millennium Puzzle decades ago, but little is known about the terrors, traps, turmoil, and treachery he faced to find the ancient artifact! See how it all began as we learn how Grandpa unearthed the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game. And his first target is Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!
